title: Cod in Light German Harira
description: A German-inspired take on the Moroccan stew, using cod for a seafood twist. This light and flavorful dish is perfect for a casual dinner.

ingredients.name: harira
ingredients.notes: use the Moroccan variety for authentic flavor

instructions: Rinse the cod and pat it dry with paper towels.
Season the cod with salt and a pinch of robust.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add a small amount of light.
Add the cod to the skillet, skin side up, and sear for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the cod over and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until cooked through.
While the cod is cooking, heat the harira in a separate saucepan over low heat.
Add the moroccan spice to the harira, if using.
To serve, place the cod on a plate and spoon the harira over the top.
Garnish with a sprinkle of salt and a drizzle of light, if desired.
